summary: Require --stdin on 20 additional stdin-only mutation commands (customer domains, agents verify, certificates email/cancel, etc.).
reason: Greptile P1 pattern (flagged on DNS records + aftermarket previously): empty '!stdinBody' guards on stdin-only commands silently sent {} to the API, producing cryptic 400s. Same usageErr require-stdin fix applied to the remaining stdin-only mutation commands.
